title: alchemilla stuhlmannii var. butaguensis
intro: Alchemilla stuhlmannii var. butaguensis, also known as Butaguens alpine lady's mantle, is a variety of the alpine lady's mantle plant, a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and calming skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Butaguens alpine lady's mantle can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
